languages.text: Черные, жуткие руины иной цивилизации потеряли всякий намек на жизнь. Теперь здесь царствует пустота и всеразрушающее течение времени.
The black, sinister ruins of the alien civilisation have lost every trace of life. Now emptiness and the all-destroying passage of time reign supreme.
languages.original_text: Черные, жуткие руины иной цивилизации потеряли всякий намек на жизнь. Теперь здесь царствует пустота и всеразрушающее течение времени.

traits.locale_text: The black, sinister ruins of the alien civilisation have lost every trace of life. Now emptiness and the all-destroying passage of time reign supreme.
The black, sinister ruins of the alien civilisation have lost every trace of life. Now emptiness and the all-destroying passage of time reign supreme.
The black, sinister ruins of the alien civilisation have lost every trace of life. Now emptiness and the all-destroying passage of time reign supreme.

languages.text: エイリアンの文明の跡は、黒く不気味な廃墟となった。生命の痕跡は消え、空虚と破壊の時間が支配する。
languages.original_text: The black, sinister ruins of the alien civilisation have lost every trace of life. Now emptiness and the all-destroying passage of time reign supreme.

traits.locale_text: エイリアンの文明の跡は、黒く不気味な廃墟となった。生命の痕跡は消え、空虚と破壊の時間が支配する。

languages.text: Las siniestras ruinas negras de la civilización alienígena no muestran rastro alguno de vida. Solo quedan el vacío y el devastador paso del tiempo.
languages.original_text: The black, sinister ruins of the alien civilisation have lost every trace of life. Now emptiness and the all-destroying passage of time reign supreme.

traits.locale_text: Las siniestras ruinas negras de la civilización alienígena no muestran rastro alguno de vida. Solo quedan el vacío y el devastador paso del tiempo.

languages.text: Die schwarzen, unheilvollen Ruinen der außerirdischen Zivilisation zeigen keinerlei Spuren von Leben. Stattdessen prägen Leere und das alles zerstörende Verstreichen der Zeit die Szenerie.
languages.original_text: The black, sinister ruins of the alien civilisation have lost every trace of life. Now emptiness and the all-destroying passage of time reign supreme.

traits.locale_text: Die schwarzen, unheilvollen Ruinen der außerirdischen Zivilisation zeigen keinerlei Spuren von Leben. Stattdessen prägen Leere und das alles zerstörende Verstreichen der Zeit die Szenerie.

languages.text: Les ruines sinistres de la mystérieuse civilisation semblent dépourvues de toute trace de vie. Désormais, n'y règnent plus que le vide et l'inexorable passage du temps.
languages.original_text: The black, sinister ruins of the alien civilisation have lost every trace of life. Now emptiness and the all-destroying passage of time reign supreme.

traits.locale_text: Les ruines sinistres de la mystérieuse civilisation semblent dépourvues de toute trace de vie. Désormais, n'y règnent plus que le vide et l'inexorable passage du temps.

languages.text: 异形文明遗留下的黑色废墟阴森不祥，早已失去一切生命迹象。如今，唯有空无与毁灭万物的时间洪流主宰着一切。
languages.original_text: The black, sinister ruins of the alien civilisation have lost every trace of life. Now emptiness and the all-destroying passage of time reign supreme.

traits.locale_text: 异形文明遗留下的黑色废墟阴森不祥，早已失去一切生命迹象。如今，唯有空无与毁灭万物的时间洪流主宰着一切。

languages.text: Uzaylı medeniyetinin kara, uğursuz harabeleri, yaşamın her türlü izini yitirmiş. Buraya artık boşluk ve her şeyi yok eden zamanın akışı hüküm sürüyor.
languages.original_text: The black, sinister ruins of the alien civilisation have lost every trace of life. Now emptiness and the all-destroying passage of time reign supreme.

traits.locale_text: Uzaylı medeniyetinin kara, uğursuz harabeleri, yaşamın her türlü izini yitirmiş. Buraya artık boşluk ve her şeyi yok eden zamanın akışı hüküm sürüyor.
